_comment: Immortal Emperor's Cave Mansion / Immortal Monarch's Cave Mansion (仙帝洞府) — a hidden cave-dwelling in the Demon Spirit Land. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L64; CANON_RI_TIMELINE.md E57): Yao Xixue ambushes Wang Lin here, leading to his 100-year imprisonment; Wind Demon (Feng Mo) is slain here by Wang Lin's God-Slaying Spear; Blood Ancestor seeks Wang Lin here. The mansion is a sealed immortal-era complex with restriction-locked chambers, an immortal-spring pool, and a thousand-year imprisonment chamber. Stand-in: woodland mansion (rare, grand underground complex). Final: custom immortal-era NBT templates with sealed chambers, immortal-spring pool, and Yao Xixue's ambush site. Biome: demon_spirit_land.
